steps.title: Translate total bushes constraint
steps.content: The problem states 'no more than 164 total bushes planted.' Since a represents azaleas and b represents boxwoods, this translates to the inequality $$a + b \leq 164$$.

steps.title: Translate azaleas-to-boxwoods ratio constraint
steps.content: The condition 'azaleas will be at most three times boxwoods' means $$a \leq 3b$$. This establishes the second inequality in the system.

steps.title: Identify system in answer choices
steps.content: The system with $$a + b \leq 164$$ and $$a \leq 3b$$ matches D. This system correctly models both constraints from the problem.
